heading: Liabilities arising prior to amendment unaffected
label: 78o–2 Liabilities arising prior to amendment unaffected
text: Nothing in this Act shall be deemed to extinguish any liability which may have arisen prior to the effective date of this Act by reason of any violation of section 78 of this title or of any rule or regulation thereunder.o
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the Unlisted Securities Trading Act, which enacted sections 78–1, 78–1, 78–2, and 78hh–1 of this title, and amended sections 78, 78, 78q, 78r, 78t, 78u, 78w, and 78ff of this title.act May 27, 1936, ch. 46249 Stat. 1375looloEffective date of this Act, referred to in text, is . See .July 1, 1934section 78hh–1 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 which comprises this chapter.
